name: GetTerminal
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific terminal by its ID. This endpoint returns complete details about a single physical point-of-sale device, including its status, brand, model, serial number, currency, and timestamps. This is useful for checking the configuration and status of a specific terminal device.

terminal_id.description: The ID of the terminal to retrieve (e.g., 'term_7MgL4wea46qkRcoTZjWEH'). This is the unique identifier assigned to the physical terminal device.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to retrieve test mode terminal information, or omit for live mode.
